title: alchemilla alpestris var. impexa
intro: Alchemilla alpestris var. impexa, commonly known as the alpine lady's mantle, is a variant of the Alchemilla alpestris plant, which belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpestris var. impexa include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including wounds, skin issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
